 Experience from a similar role is required: office management, event coordinator, or a combination. You know what it takes to run an office and create an environment people actually enjoy coming to.
   

  

 You've worked in fast-moving environments and know how to create structure without slowing things down. You can point to experience owning something long-term, and you're equally comfortable being the person who just fixes what needs fixing today.
   

  

 On the recruitment side, prior sourcing or screening experience is a plus, but what matters most is genuine curiosity about the craft. You want to understand how great hiring works, and you're excited about playing a part in the full arc: finding the right people, getting them off to a great start, and helping them stay.
   

  

*At Bannerflow, we live by our values of passion, collaboration, and challenge. As an Office Experience Manager, you’ll be the person who brings those values to life every day.* 
*You'll shape the environment where our teams do their best work, from the office itself to the moments that make people feel like they belong here.* 
*You'll be the one making our team events actually happen, keeping the Friday beers flowing, and helping hackathons run without a hitch.*
*We believe that our employees are the key to our success and we are dedicated to building a positive and supportive work environment where our employees can thrive and grow. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive team and welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, experiences, and abilities.*

title: Data Platform Administrator
description:
**ComeOn Group in Short** 




 ComeOn Group in short Founded in 2008, ComeOn Group is a leading global player in the rapidly growing iGaming market. Having launched its first online brand in 2010, ComeOn Group is running a wide range of exciting brands across multiple markets. Operating more than 20 brands on its proprietary platform providing a secure, innovative and entertainment-led player experience across casino and sports betting. ComeOn Group is an international employer within the iGaming industry and has over 500 talented employees across 7 main locations.
 



  





**Location** 
 : Stockholm, Sweden(Hybrid)
 



  





 ComeOn Group is a data-driven company, and our Data Platform Engineering & Operations team is critical to enabling business success. We are seeking a technically strong Data Platform Administrator with deep operational expertise, someone confident in managing MySQL and MongoDB across all environments. You will be responsible for platform uptime, schema changes, performance optimization and managing large-scale data operations and migrations. This role combines hands-on operational work with growth into broader data engineering responsibilities, giving you the opportunity to influence platform reliability, support analytics and drive key projects across the organization.
 



  





 Responsibilities:
 


* Own MySQL, MongoDB and related systems across development and production environments.
* Ensure database uptime, reliability, performance tuning, monitoring, scaling, backups and security.
* Manage schema changes, large-table operations, and data migrations with confidence and precision.
* Lead database upgrades and work with teams to refactor legacy structures into modern, scalable designs.
* Automate operational tasks to increase efficiency and reliability.
* Support real-time pipelines and data flows across teams.
* Support audits, change management and regulatory compliance.
* Manage access controls and release processes.
* Partner with developers, product owners, BI teams and QA to ensure high-quality, reliable data.
* Collaborate with the team and grow into broader engineering responsibilities over time.



 About you:
 


* 5+ years of experience in MySQL and MongoDB administration.
* Experience with schema changes, large-table operations, performance tuning and migrations.
* Strong operational mindset: high-availability setups, backups and platform reliability.
* Comfortable in a fast-paced, hands-on environment.
* Exposure to cloud platforms (BigQuery, AWS, GCP).
* Scripting/automation experience (Python, Bash, SQL). Proactive, confident and ready to take ownership.
* Collaborates effectively with developers, product owners, BI teams, QA and DevOps.
* Eager to modernize legacy database structures and expand into broader data engineering responsibilities, including understanding modern dataflow tooling and pipelines.
* Proficient in English, both spoken and written.



**Benefits** 




 So what can you expect from ComeOn as a place of work? Benefits:
 


* A competitive remuneration package inc. a company bonus scheme! 💰
* Fantastic quarterly team events and weekly company events 😎
* A one-time bonus to help you set up a comfortable workstation at home (we’re truly Hybrid!)
* On top of our Hybrid work arrangement, up to 40 days a year to work fully remote from anywhere 🌎
* 30 paid vacation days a year
* Generous pension and insurance benefits
* Brand new laptop and smartphone with fully paid plan
* Generous health subsidy benefit
* Company events, including breakfast mornings and Friday beers



  





 At ComeOn, we have adapted a Hybrid Work model which means that we offer our employees an option to pick their workstation for the day. Want to work from the office a few days a week and some days from home? That’s totally fine with us! ComeOn is known for their inviting and vibrant offices that offer creative areas for collaboration and desk set-ups designed for a Hybrid Work model. When you visit one of our offices you will always be welcomed by a friendly face that will take good care of you. It’s our curiosity that drives our innovative business forward and we work hard in a run together spirit and we always make sure to top it up by having fun! You will not regret picking ComeOn as your next place of work.
 



  





 At ComeOn Group we value diversity and we take concrete action to ensure fairness in our recruitment process. We are committed to assess candidates on their merit without discriminating against any applicant for whatever reason that is protected by law. We truly value you, as you are. Want to know more about us just visit our website www.comeon-group.com or any of our social media channels to take a deep dive into our culture! LinkedIn Instagram Facebook

title: Franchisetagare till Bålsta
description:
**Är du fastighetsmäklare och drömmer om att bygga något eget – med ett starkt varumärke i ryggen? Nu har du chansen att starta upp ett helt nytt kontor för LF Fastighetsförmedling i Bålsta!**
**Om möjligheten**
 Vi söker dig som vill ta nästa stora steg i karriären och vara med från början när LF Fastighetsförmedling etablerar sig i Bålsta. Det här är en unik möjlighet för dig som vill kombinera entreprenörskap med tryggheten i en av Sveriges starkaste mäklarkedjor.
   

  

 Du blir en del av en kedja som växer och tar marknadsandelar, samtidigt som du får friheten att bygga upp ett lokalt kontor med stark närvaro och god förankring i Bålsta. Kulturen inom LF Fastighetsförmedling präglas av engagemang, värme och samarbete – med högt i tak, stark laganda och en tydlig vilja att lyckas tillsammans.
   

  

**Vårt erbjudande**
 När du startar LF Fastighetsförmedling i Bålsta gör du det med ett fulltäckande servicebolag i ryggen. Vi stöttar dig inom juridik, IT, marknadsföring, affärsutveckling och personalfrågor, så att du kan fokusera på affären och på att bygga ditt kontor.
   

  

 Du får tillgång till kontinuerlig utbildning och utveckling samt stora möjligheter att påverka hur kontoret utformas, växer och utvecklas över tid. Vi söker ett långsiktigt samarbete och vill arbeta tillsammans med dig som har ambitionen att bygga en stark och hållbar verksamhet i Bålsta.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har arbetat som fastighetsmäklare i några år och som nu är redo för ett större ansvar. Du är affärsdriven, målmedveten och har en tydlig vision för hur du vill bygga och utveckla ett framgångsrikt mäklarkontor.
   

  

 Du är en ödmjuk vinnarskalle med entreprenöriell ådra, som värdesätter både resultat och relationer. Kundnöjdhet är en självklar prioritet för dig, och du ser styrkan i att kombinera affärsmässighet med teamkänsla.
   

  

 Det är ett krav att du är registrerad fastighetsmäklare, och det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av att driva bolag eller leda verksamhet.
   

  

**Varför LF Fastighetsförmedling?**
 LF Fastighetsförmedling är idag Sveriges näst största mäklarkedja – men vår ambition är att bli ledande. Hos oss verkar du under ett av landets starkaste varumärken, där bank, försäkring och fastighetsförmedling samverkar under samma tak. Det skapar unika affärsmöjligheter och ett starkt kunderbjudande som gynnar både dig och dina kunder.
   

  

 Låter det här som rätt nästa steg för dig? Välkommen att träffa oss för ett förutsättningslöst möte över en kaffe! Skicka in din ansökan eller kontakta regionchef Peo Mårtensson på 0709‑23 01 30/peo.martensson@lansfast.se direkt. All kontakt hanteras självklart konfidentiellt.
   

  

 Peo Mårtensson
   

  

 Kontaktperson
   

  

 Ansök nu eller
   

  

 Besök bobutik
   

  

 0709‑23 01 30
   

  

 Maila Peo Mårtensson

title: Legal Counsel - Compliance & Risk
description:
At Billogram we like to be the good guys of billing, making money when clients are happy and pay on time rather than from missed payments. We believe it always pays off to treat people well. That’s why our platform for invoices and payments is built to remove pain and instead be of gain to both our clients and their customers – improving their relations.
 



  





 To ensure continuous growth and become a leader in the European consumer billing market we are looking for a Legal Counsel - Compliance & Risk to join our team.
 



  





**About the role** 




 As our Legal Counsel - Compliance & Risk, you'll be a key player in making sure Billogram stays compliant while also enabling the business to move fast and grow with confidence. This is a hands-on role in the first line of defense, meaning you'll work closely with product, tech, operations, and commercial teams, not reviewing from the sidelines, but actively helping us do things right from the start.
 



  





 The role combines compliance with proactive risk work. Your primary focus will be AML and financial compliance, but you'll also drive our risk management efforts (including IT and operational risk), contribute to GDPR and internal policy work, and support broader regulatory matters.
 



  





 You'll be part of a small, collaborative team where ownership and impact come with the territory. You'll have real influence and a lot of variety in your everyday work.
 



  





**Primary responsibilities** 



* **Day-to-day compliance support:** 
 Provide hands-on guidance and support to teams across the organization on day-to-day risk and compliance matters, including AML and KYC.
* **Risk identification & mitigation:** 
 Identify, assess, and support mitigation of risks across the organization, including both regulatory compliance and broader business risks.
* **Quarterly risk assessment:** 
 Own the process end-to-end, including setting it up, facilitating the review meetings, and translating findings into action.
* **External relations & regulatory reporting:** 
 Manage reporting to Finansinspektionen, act as the main point of contact for our external control function, and collaborate with our external second line compliance partner.
* **Business partnering:** 
 Be a sounding board to product, tech, and commercial teams, helping them navigate regulatory requirements pragmatically and integrate compliance into daily operations.
* **Policies, framework & training:** 
 Develop and maintain internal policies and procedures, contribute to the continuous development of Billogram's overall risk and compliance framework, drive training and awareness across the company, and support matters related to information security and data protection.
* **Regulatory monitoring:** 
 Stay on top of developments (e.g. GDPR, PSD2, AML, DORA, AI Act) and translate them into practical guidance for the business.



  





**What we are looking for** 




 As a person, you combine sharp thinking with a hands-on approach. You're not afraid to roll up your sleeves and get things done, whether that means drafting a policy, coordinating a risk assessment, or pushing back on a proposal that doesn't quite hold up.
 



  





 You take ownership of your topics and drive them forward independently. You're structured and analytical, bringing order to complexity even when things shift around you. You're solution-oriented and use good judgment when balancing regulatory requirements with business needs. You know when to be pragmatic and when to stand firm, the kind of person who can push back when needed while staying constructive and collaborative.
 



  





 Curious by nature, you're eager to understand how the business works and how compliance and risk can support rather than block it. You build trust quickly across teams and translate complex regulation into clear, actionable guidance.
 



  





**Skills & traits which will help you succeed in this role** 



* **Experience:** 
 Minimum 2 years of relevant work experience, ideally in a compliance or risk role within fintech or payments
* **Education:** 
 A university degree in law is a requirement
* **AML/KYC expertise:** 
 Hands-on knowledge of AML/KYC frameworks is a requirement
* **Regulatory knowledge:** 
 Familiarity with relevant regulatory frameworks, such as PSD2, DORA and the AI Act, is beneficial.
* **Adaptability:** 
 Experience from a fast-paced, changing environment is advantageous
* **Broader risk:** 
 Experience or interest in broader risk areas, including IT and operational risk, is a plus
* **GDPR knowledge:** 
 Experience and knowledge of GDPR is a plus
* **Tech curiosity:** 
 Understanding of and interest in IT and technology is beneficial
* **Languages:** 
 Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and verbal, is a requirement



  





**Why work with us?** 




 At Billogram we promise you an exciting journey as we break into new markets and grow at a rapid pace. That aside you will get lots of freedom and opportunity to develop together with great colleagues at our office, right in the center of Stockholm. We also offer flexible working hours, exciting challenges and a whole lot of laughs.
 



  





 We're committed to your long-term development, offering clear career progression paths. You'll also enjoy a fantastic benefits package, including 30 (+2) days of holiday, an occupational pension, a generous wellness allowance, sick leave top-up, and parental leave compensation. At Billogram, our inclusive and diverse culture ensures that everyone can enjoy a fulfilling career and a great work-life balance.
 



  





 At Billogram, we provide equal opportunities and strive for an inclusive and diverse environment. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to gender, transgender identity or expression, ethnicity, religion or other beliefs, disability, sexual orientation, or age.
 



 Welcome to the world of Billogram!

title: Teknisk SAP-Konsult
description:
*Brinner du för SAP-teknik och har förmågan att kombinera teknisk expertis med funktionell insikt? Vi söker dig som vill skapa förståelse för våra kunders affärsprocesser och inspirera dem att utveckla innovativa tekniska lösningar.* 




  





**Om rollen** 




 Som teknisk SAP-konsult hos VASS blir du en nyckelspelare i att hjälpa våra kunder att realisera sina digitala ambitioner. Ditt uppdrag är att omsätta affärsbehov till praktiska och innovativa SAP-lösningar. Med en djup förståelse för verktygets mångsidighet hjälper du kunder att agera på deras kunddata, vilket optimerar deras affärsprocesser. Oavsett om det gäller automatisering, rapportering eller integration med andra system, blir du den expert som vägleder och formar den tekniska lösningen i samarbete med kund och team. I denna roll kombineras teknisk skicklighet med strategisk insikt, arbetandes sida vid sida med VASS expertteam. Vill du ta din karriär till nästa nivå och utveckla framtidens kundupplevelser? Välkommen att ansöka!
 



  





**Dina kompetenser och egenskaper** 



* Utbildning som ingenjör, ekonom eller arbetslivserfarenheter som demonstrerar en stark förmåga att sätta sig in och lösa problem.
* Tidigare erfarenhet av SAP, gärna i rollen som konsult.
* Förstår vikten av göra det lilla extra när det behövs men kan samtidigt ge sig själv (och andra) en paus när det behövs.
* Trivs i att verka i en föränderlig miljö och inser att flexibilitet är en superkraft.
* Vågar ta hjälp och även hjälpa andra.
* Nyfiken.



  





**Mer om rollen** 




 Vi rekryterar löpande och ser gärna att du kan börja så snart som möjligt men månar om att hitta rätt person. Därför värderar vi dina personliga egenskaper och att vi trivs ihop högt.
 



  





 Har du frågor eller funderingar? Kontakta rekryterande chef Andreas Åkerblad på andreas.akerblad@vasscompany.com
 



  





**Om VASS** 




 Med en kombinerad kraft av 250 lokala experter, och fler än 4 000 globala kollegor inom VASS, tar vi en ledande roll inom IT- och management-konsulting. Vi tar fram strategier, designar och realiserar tjänster som inte bara uppfyller kundens behov, utan också driver deras affär framåt. Vårt arbete går från idé till genomförande och vidareutveckling, med fokus på människan, tekniken och affären. Vår framgång bygger på engagerade team av drivna kollegor. Vill du vara en del av vår framgång?
 



  





 Hos VASS står du alltid i fokus. Här får du utrymme att påverka din utveckling och möjligheten att växa i nya roller. Vi rustar dig med rätt kunskap och de rätta verktygen för din professionella och personliga utvecklingsresa. När du växer, växer företag.

title: Bagagetekniker till Swedavia, Stockholm Arlanda Airport
description:
Gillar du teknik, problemlösning och en arbetsplats där det alltid händer något? Då kan det här vara jobbet för dig! Nu söker Swedavia bagagetekniker till Stockholm Arlanda Airport, en av Sveriges mest samhällskritiska och spännande arbetsplatser.
   

  

 Swedavia har uppdraget att äga, underhålla och utveckla all infrastruktur på Arlanda, en samhällsviktig verksamhet som är öppen och i drift dygnet runt, året om vilket innebär att vi arbetar 3-skift. Vårt uppdrag är att leverera funktion, kapacitet och hög tillgänglighet till våra resenärer. Nu söker vi dig som har erfarenhet av mekanik, svets, el eller styr och reglerteknik.
   

  

**Vad innebär rollen?**
 Som Bagagetekniker är ditt huvudsakliga uppdrag att arbeta med tekniskt underhåll i våra bagageanläggningar. Du är en nyckelperson för att säkerställa att bagageanläggningen fungerar felfritt och i nära samarbete med andra aktörer samt olika delar av organisationen bidrar du till en säker och effektiv drift. I rollen ingår tunga lyft och arbete på hög höjd.
   

  

**Bland arbetsuppgifterna ingår**
* Förebyggande- och periodiskt underhåll.
* Hantera akuta felavhjälpning/felsökningar, återställning utav olika larm i bagageanläggningen.
* Förbättringsarbete


 I arbetet med våra bagageanläggningar kommer du i kontakt med elinstallationer, IT, styrsystem, mekanik och pneumatik. Även svetsning och byggarbete förekommer. Således kommer vi att använda oss av teoretiska och fysiska arbetstester under denna rekryteringsprocess.
   

  

**Vem är du?
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har**
* Gymnasiekompetens inom relevant område eller annan motsvarande utbildning/erfarenhet.
* Teknisk erfarenhet inom exempelvis mekanik, el, PLC, svets, styr-och reglerteknik eller byggarbete.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* God datorvana.
* God fysik.
* Du är lyhörd och har lätt för att samarbeta, samt att du kan arbeta självständigt.
* Du är flexibel och stresstålig.
* Du kan prioritera viktiga och akuta arbetsuppgifter.
* Du har förmåga att strukturera upp ditt arbete.
* Kunna fatta egna beslut.
* B-körkort.


**Meriterande**
 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av AI, tekniskt underhåll, felsökning och drift av större system och/eller tekniska anläggningar. Erfarenhet av arbete i komplexa miljöer med höga krav på tillgänglighet och säkerhet ses som en fördel.
   

  

**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 Vi erbjuder dig en rolig tjänst där det finns stora möjligheter att utveckla sina tekniska kunskaper inom flera olika områden.
   

  

 Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Jukka Björk, Jukka.bjork@swedavia.se.
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag är den 20 juli, urval sker löpande och annonsen kan stängas tidigare så tveka inte att söka redan idag!**
**Hur är det att arbeta på Swedavia?**
 Vårt fokus är att möjliggöra hållbart resande och uppmuntra nytänkande för att skapa en välkomnande, trygg och inkluderande arbetsgemenskap där du kan växa och göra verklig skillnad – läs mer här! Jobba hos oss | Om Swedavia
   

  

 För en objektiv och rättvis rekrytering använder vi arbetspsykologiska tester som en del av urvalsprocessen.
   

  

 Då flygplatser är säkerhetskänslig verksamhet genomgår samtliga kandidater som går vidare i rekryteringsprocessen en bakgrundskontroll. Innan anställning sker även en säkerhetsprövning i enlighet med Transportstyrelsens regler om luftfartsskydd samt Säkerhetsskyddslagen. Swedavia är även en drogfri arbetsplats med nolltolerans mot droger. Drogtester genomförs före anställning och sker slumpmässigt under anställningen.

title: Product Marketing Manager
description:
**Driven by the belief that shopping should be simple and seamless, we help global fashion and lifestyle retailers by fulfilling our mission to create positive shopping experiences, every time, everywhere.** 




  





**Our vision is to empower retailers with the world’s leading Unified Commerce Platform and Point of Sale, removing the barriers between e-commerce, online marketplaces, and brick-and-mortar stores to support new shopping behaviors.** 




  





**We’re a fast-growing Swedish tech company trusted by global retailers in more than 20 countries, a number that keeps growing, and we have no intention of stopping anytime soon. As a member of our team, you’ll have the opportunity to influence the future of retail. Are you the Product Marketing Manager we’re looking for?** 




  





**Your mission at Sitoo** 




  





 We’re looking for a Product Marketing Manager to bridge the gap between our product capabilities and the market. You’ll be the person who translates what we build into compelling positioning, messaging, and enablement that drives adoption, improves win rates, and supports retention.
 



  





 You’ll bring a strong outside-in perspective to the team, keeping a close eye on competitor movements and market signals to ensure fast market readiness for our launches. You’ll take that knowledge and turn it into consistent, customer-facing narratives that replace mismatched slide decks with clean, unified value propositions.
 



  





 You won’t be doing this alone. You’ll be part of a tight-knit marketing team, collaborating closely with product, sales, customer success, and leadership. But when it comes to defining our product narrative and driving launch readiness, you’ll be the one making things happen.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 




  




* Partner with PMs to define the 'Who, Why, and When' of product releases, ensuring that every feature has a clear commercial value proposition
* Own the structure and quality bar for sales enablement materials, ensuring narrative consistency in commercial decks and keeping competitive battle cards sharp.
* Package quarterly updates into reusable customer narratives to support renewals, while ensuring consistency across release notes and voice-of-customer feedback loops.
* Act as a market-intelligence hub, feeding win/loss analysis, competitor shifts, and customer pain points directly into the product discovery process to influence roadmap prioritization
* Establish lightweight, structured processes for project intake and prioritization, keeping our positioning aligned with market movements and competitor shifts.



  





**What you’ll bring to the table** 




  





**We are looking for a strategic and commercially driven product marketer who thrives in bridging the gap between product innovation and market execution. You are someone who has a deep curiosity for market dynamics and competitor movements, but equally enjoys the hands-on creation of clear, impactful narratives and sales enablement materials.** 




  




* Proven experience defining and implementing product marketing processes (e.g GTM frameworks, competitive intel systems) in scaling or enterprise grade organizations.
* Strong strategic thinking combined with exceptional writing skills and the ability to turn technical product details into simple, value-led stories.
* Commercial mindset with an understanding of how retailers buy, adopt technology, and measure business value.
* Excellent organizational skills to self-direct and ruthlessly prioritize a broad roadmap across launch kits, messaging frameworks, and sales tools.
* An outside-in approach with a natural curiosity to analyze market signals and collaborate effectively across product, sales, and customer success teams.
* Professional fluency in English, combined with a genuine interest in retail tech and the future of commerce.



  





**Why Sitoo** 




  





 We dare to dream big, we have the courage to keep raising the bar, and we’re committed to being a force for good in retail. We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels a sense of belonging. We support each other, we win together, we celebrate success together, and we overcome challenges together.
 



  





 Today, we’re more than 115 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.

title: Sales Development Representative - utvecklas inom B2B-Mötesbokning 🚀
description:
**Vi söker dig som tidigare arbetat med mötesbokning till vårt framgångsrika SDR-Team i hjärtat av Vasastan, Stockholm!** 




  





 Som Sales Development Representative inom B2B kommer du att vara central i vår verksamhet och spela en nyckelroll i att skapa affärsmöjligheter. Din uppgift är att boka möten mellan våra försäljningsrepresentanter och potentiella företagskunder, där du representerar några av marknadens mest framstående aktörer och får möjlighet att jobba med en stor variation av projekt.
 



  





**✨ DIN ROLL INNEBÄR:** 




  




* **Skapa affärsmöjligheter:** 
 Engagera dig i försäljning över telefon och bidra till vår framgång genom att boka möten.
* **Sätt och nå mål:** 
 Utmana dig själv och driv din försäljning mot ambitiösa budgetmål.
* **Teamwork i toppklass:** 
 Arbeta nära med ett passionerat och engagerat team där din insats gör skillnad varje dag.


- 


**✨ VI SÖKER DIG SOM:** 




  




* Har tidigare erfarenhet inom mötesbokning.
* Har en orubblig vilja och en stark drivkraft att ständigt utvecklas både personligt och professionellt.
* Använder flytande svenska i både tal och skrift och kan uttrycka dig klart och tydligt.
* Är hungrig på utveckling. Erfarenhet inom försäljning är meriterande, men din vilja att lära och växa är avgörande.



  





**✨ VI ERBJUDER DIG:** 




  





 Fastlön + Provision.
 



 Heltidstjänst: Mån - fre kl. 08-17 (fredagar slutar vi faktiskt 16 ☀️)
 



 Personlig och professionell utveckling genom olika utbildningar.
 



 Möjlighet till karriärsutveckling inom företaget.
 



  





**IMPRESSIVE RELATIONS** 




  





 Vi är ett etablerat Sälj- och Bemanningsföretag, grundat år 2012. Vi jobbar idag med flera stora aktörer över hela Norden, inom branscherna Bank & Finans, IT, Solenergi m.m.
 



 Impressive ser starkt på personlig utveckling och erbjuder kontinuerliga säljutbildningar. Vi ger våra medarbetare möjligheten oavsett tidigare erfarenhet
 **att växa inom företaget** 
 . Här får du som medarbetare själv bestämma hur långt du vill nå. Vi jobbar alltid i starka team och skapar roliga arbetsdagar tillsammans.
 



 Bli en del av vårt äventyr på Impressive Relations, där varje dag erbjuder nya möjligheter till personlig och professionell utveckling. Vi tror på att göra skillnad, och
 **vi vill ha dig med på resan!** 




  





 📩
 **Kontaktperson:** 




 Felicia Rullander
 



 📞 076-425 35 70
 



 📧
 
 Felicia.rullander@impressiverelations.se

title: Design and Engineering Tools Deployment Lead NB Zone
description:
We are looking for a Design and Engineering Deployment Lead – Design and Build software – Nordic Baltic Zone to manage the rollout and adoption of our software solutions across the Nordic Baltic region. Schneider Electric has a wide cutting-edge portfolio of software, tools and configurators to support the design, optimization and building processes of our customers and partners.
   

  

 In this role, you will work closely with internal sales teams, design offices, panel builders, system integrators and contractors. You will play a key part in defining, deploying, and training our partners on our software tools within electrical distribution, building systems, and related solutions.
   

  

 This is an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys working in an international environment, understands design and build processes, and can form a strong overall picture of both technical and business needs. The role is also suitable for early career candidates with strong motivation to learn and grow.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Software Definition & Deployment**
* Manage the rollout of software tools within the Nordic organization.
* Understand the overall software portfolio of Schneider internal and external third-party software and tools and the value they can bring.
* Understand how Schneider can best support the design and build processes of our partners with our software and configurators.
* Actively collect market feedback on software requirements and functionalities.


**Sales & Customer Support**
* Provide hands-on support for channel sales teams, helping them convey the message and bring added value to design offices, panel builders, contractors, and system integrators.
* Act as a subject-matter expert for software related topics.
* Offer pre-sales and post-sales software expertise to internal sales teams.


**Training & Enablement**
* Deliver training to internal and external stakeholders (software, tools/configurators, or process related).
* Prepare and present training materials to different audiences.
* Ensure successful adoption of software tools across markets.


**Required Skills & Experience**
* Ability and motivation to work in an international and Nordic-wide environment.
* Good understanding of design/planning/building processes and related software tools.
* Ability to form a clear overall picture of technical concepts and workflows.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Experience collaborating with internal teams, customers, and external partners.
* Not required to be highly technical but must understand processes and tools well enough to guide others.
* Proficiency in English. Other Nordic languages are considered a bonus.


**Why Schneider Electric?** 
  

  

 At Schneider Electric, we are committed to fostering a vibrant and inclusive work culture where every employee is empowered to thrive. As part of our team, you can expect:
   

  

* Professional Growth: Access to continuous learning opportunities, mentorship programs, and career development resources to nurture your potential and drive your career forward.
* Innovative Environment: Be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking organization that encourages creativity, innovation, and entrepreneurial spirit as we lead the way in digital transformation and sustainability.
* Work-Life Balance: We value your well-being and offer flexible work arrangements, comprehensive wellness programs, and support to help you maintain a healthy work-life balance.
* Global Impact: Contribute to meaningful projects that address global energy challenges and sustainability, making a positive impact on the world while advancing your career.
* Inclusive Community: Join a diverse and inclusive community where your unique perspectives are celebrated, and your voice is heard, fostering an environment of collaboration and belonging.


**Did we get you inspired?**
 Apply now to embark on an exciting career journey with us!
   

  

 Submit your application today as we will fill the position as soon as a suitable candidate is found.
   

  

**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €40 billion global revenue
   

  

 +9% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Analytics Engineer till Borgo
description:
Borgo bygger ett datadrivet bolag och söker nu en Analytics Engineer med fokus på analys, modellering och affärsinsikter. Här får du arbeta nära verksamheten och skapa dataprodukter som faktiskt används och påverkar.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Du blir en nyckelperson i att göra data tillgänglig, begriplig och värdeskapande.
   

  

**Du Kommer Bland Annat Att**
* Äga och utveckla dbt-lagret (modellering, tester, dokumentation)
* Bygga analytiska datamodeller och semantiska lager
* Skapa dashboards och rapporter i Power BI
* Arbeta nära stakeholders och omvandla behov till lösningar
* Säkerställa tydliga definitioner och hög datakvalitet
* Stötta organisationen i ett mer datadrivet arbetssätt


 Du arbetar i skärningspunkten mellan data, analys och affär. Du rapporterar till Head of Data och arbetar nära både tekniska och affärsnära funktioner – mot interna team, outsourcingpartners och förmedlare av bolån
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
* Har god erfarenhet av dbt, SQL och datamodellering
* Har arbetat med BI-verktyg, gärna Power BI
* Är van att arbeta nära verksamheten och stakeholders
* Har erfarenhet av att ta data från modell till insikt


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av Snowflake eller moderna dataplattformar
* Erfarenhet från bank/finans eller reglerad miljö
* Erfarenhet av data governance
* Erfarenhet av att driva datadrivet arbetssätt i organisationer


 Som person är du pedagogisk och kan förklara data på ett enkelt sätt. Du är proaktiv och kommer med konkreta rekommendationer, har stark affärsförståelse och tänker värde först. Du trivs i dialoger med stakeholders och arbetar självgående.
   

  

**Varför Borgo?**
* Bygg något från grunden – inte legacy
* Modern datastack
* Snabba beslutsvägar och stort mandat
* Direkt koppling mellan ditt arbete och affärsresultat
* En unik möjlighet att vara med och forma ett datadrivet bolag


 På Borgo är ingen dag den andra lik. Du kommer att påverka på riktigt – både hur de arbetar med data idag och hur de bygger för framtiden.
   

  

**Om Amendo**
 Amendo har arbetat med framtidens kompetens sedan 2001 och är landets ledande konsult- och rekryteringsföretag inom ekonomi, bank, finans, försäkring, IT och tech. Vi hjälper företag att växa och människor att utvecklas. Vi är din trygga och engagerade kompetenspartner.
   

  

 Följ oss gärna på
 **Linkedin** 
 ,
 **Instagram** 
 och
 **Facebook** 
 .
   

  

**Frågor och kontakt**
 I denna rekrytering samarbetar Borgo med Amendo. Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Business Area Manager Johanna Hallenberg på johanna.hallenberg@amendo.se. Då vi träffar kandidater löpande är du varmt välkommen att söka tjänsten så snart som möjligt. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 #IT
   

  

 Amendo har arbetat med framtidens kompetens sedan 2001 och är landets ledande konsult- och rekryteringsföretag inom ekonomi, bank, finans, försäkring, IT och tech. Vi är ett expansivt bolag verksamma över hela landet med lokala kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Örnsköldsvik.
   

  

 Vår vision att utveckla världen med kompetens når vi genom att arbeta nära våra kunder och kandidater, vara nyfikna på omvärlden - och hela tiden vilja framåt.
   

  

 Läs mer på amendo.se.

title: Pédopsychiatre (relocate to Ireland)
description:
We are looking for Consultant Psychiatrists specialized in child and adolescent (Pédopsychiatre) to work in Ireland.
 



  





 Posts are based within a multidisciplinary team environment and focuses on assessment, diagnosis, treatment, and ongoing care for individuals under 18 years of age.
 



  





**These are specific purpose contracts of 12 months initially.** 




**Salaries between €235,862 to €283,318 per year based on experience working 37 hours per week.** 




**30 days of annual leave, 10 days of public holidays and up to 10 days of medical education leave.** 




  





 Main Duties & Responsibilities
 



  




* Deliver specialist assessment, diagnostic formulation, and treatment of mental illnesses and/or mental disorders in children and adolescents, in line with the National Standardised Operating Procedure for CAMHS and subsequent national policies and guidelines.
* Ensure duties are carried out in a timely manner to minimise delays for patients and service disruption.
* Maintain accurate, detailed, and contemporaneous medical records of all clinical interactions.
* Provide prompt notification to the Executive Clinical Director and the Mental Health Commission of any serious untoward incidents, in accordance with relevant regulations.
* Work collaboratively within a multidisciplinary team to provide a high standard of care.



  





 Eligibility Criteria
 



  





 Applicants must:
 


* Register as specialist in the Specialist Division of the Register of Medical Practitioners maintained by the Medical Council in Ireland (we will give full support to understand the process and apply for it).
* Specialist in
 **Child and Adolescent Psychiatry (Pédopsychiatre).**
* Experience as a specialist in child and adolescent psychiatry (minimum 3 months).
* Good english level
* Willing to relocate to Ireland

title: Risk Management Expert
description:
**We help the world run better**
 At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.
   

  

**Purpose and Objectives**
 SAP Government Security (GS2) is part of the Sovereign Services & Delivery, enabling SAPs Sovereign Cloud.
   

  

 GS2 ensures SAP’s fulfilment of regulations for government security, critical infrastructure, and telecommunications compliance globally, thus enabling SAP performing business in regulated industries and markets.
   

  

 All mandate holders for national security (Security Cleared Single Points of Contact for National Security Supervisory Authorities) are in the reporting line to GS2.
   

  

**Education And Qualification/Skills And Competencies**
**Educational Background**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Risk Management, Security Studies, Intelligence, Public Policy, International Relations, Law, or a related field.
* Professional certifications advantageous such as:
+ Certified Risk Management Professional (CRMP)
+ ISO 31000 Risk Management Certification
+ Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP)
+ Security Clearance appropriate to role and country


**Regulatory Expertise**
* Expertise in regulatory and governance frameworks relevant to national security and cloud (e.g. Security Protection Act (2018:585) (Säkerhetsskyddslag), Protective Security Ordinance (2021:955) (Säkerhetsskyddsförordning)
* Knowledge of geopolitical and threat landscape analysis including cyber, espionage, economic security, and hybrid threats
* Understanding of legal and ethical considerations in national security operations


**Public Sector & Defence Experience**
* Hands-on experience working within or alongside:
+ Ministry of Defence or equivalent defence departments
+ National intelligence agencies
+ Government security or policy-making bodies
+ Armed forces or defence contractors

* Experience in developing or implementing risk management frameworks tailored to sensitive government or defence programs.
* Demonstrated ability to engage with senior government stakeholders, policy advisors, and operational units.


**Analytical & Strategic Thinking**
* Strong analytical skills for threat and risk analysis in high-stakes environments.
* Ability to apply both qualitative and quantitative risk assessment methods.
* Track record of supporting strategic decision-making through robust risk forecasting, scenario planning, and mitigation strategies.


**Communication & Stakeholder Management**
* Excellent communication skills for briefings, risk reporting, and strategic advisories to senior leadership.
* Experience liaising with cross-departmental teams, international partners, and regulatory bodies.
* Skilled in translating technical or classified risk issues into actionable policy recommendations.


**Other Attributes**
* High level of integrity, discretion, and professional judgment.
* Resilience and ability to operate under pressure or in crisis situations.
* Commitment to continuous learning and development in national and international security affairs.


**Expectation and Tasks**
**Requirements**
 GS2 enables business in heavily regulated markets, managing SAPs Government Security and Critical Infrastructure worldwide. GS2 understands customers national security risk position and translates risk into actionable requirements, processes and controls. Thus, this role is expected to fulfill the following tasks:
   

  

* Act as National Security Advisor within the market unit SWEDEN and the Region EMEA/MEE
* Manage SAPs Government Accreditations in SWEDEN
* Manage Supervisory Authority Interactions for Secrecy & Critical Infrastructure
* Understand Customers National Security Risks – across the Nordics Region (SWE, FIN, NOR, DEN)
* Translate National Security Requirements into actionable processes & controls
* Enable SAPs Sovereign Cloud via customer and supervisory authortiy interactions
* Perform National Security Governance and Risk Management
* Support the Global Customer Officer in enabling key and strategic deals involving classified, regulated, or sovereignty-sensitive customer environments.
* Provide early-stage advisory to sales, presales, and account teams on government security and secrecy requirements, ensuring deals are aligned with national and regional regulatory frameworks.
* Follow closely GS2-related deals in the region and coordinate with LSOs to obtain regular updates, escalate risks and define mitigation strategies. Help to unblock deals while maintaining full compliance with SAP's GS2 framework and local legal requirements.
* Contribute to executive briefings by monitoring key regulatory developments in the region, gathering key analysis about regulated industries stakes and challenges and their implications for customers and business opportunities.
* Represent EMEA/MEE secrecy matters in business enablement discussions, ensuring regional specifics are properly reflected in deals to drive approval processes and support their qualification and structuring.
* Build and maintain a trusted advisor relationship with the Global Customer Officer for Business Enablement, providing regular updates on the regional pipeline, emerging risks, and regulatory developments impacting deal execution.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of GS2 business enablement processes, sharing regional best practices, lessons learned, and customer feedback with the GS2 organization.
* Engage with customers, government authorities, and partners as required to clarify secrecy expectations, negotiate security annexes, and demonstrate SAP's capability to deliver under GS2 conditions.


**Work Experience**
* Extensive experience (7–10+ years) in risk management within national security, defence, intelligence, or public sector environments.
* Deep understanding of national and international security policy frameworks, doctrines, and strategies.


**Bring out your best**
 SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
   

  

**We win with inclusion**
 SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.
   

  

 SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.
   

  

 For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.
   

  

 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.
   

  

 Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor.
   

  

**AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
 For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
   

  

 Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.
